name: Growth Funnel - Ad Traffic to Signup Completion

panels.title: Weekly stage progression by source
panels.hogql: SELECT toStartOfWeek(timestamp) AS week_start, coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, event, uniq(distinct_id) AS users FROM events WHERE event IN ('clerk_sign_up_started','clerk_sign_up_completed','onboarding_viewed','onboarding_assessment_complete','dashboard_welcome_viewed') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 12 WEEK GROUP BY week_start, paid_source, event ORDER BY week_start ASC, paid_source ASC, event ASC

panels.title: Signup conversion by source (start to complete)
panels.hogql: WITH started AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_started FROM events WHERE event = 'clerk_sign_up_started' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source), completed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_completed FROM events WHERE event = 'clerk_sign_up_completed' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source) SELECT coalesce(started.paid_source, completed.paid_source) AS paid_source, coalesce(started.users_started, 0) AS users_started, coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) AS users_completed, if(coalesce(started.users_started, 0) = 0, 0, round(100.0 * coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) / started.users_started, 2)) AS signup_cvr_percent FROM started FULL OUTER JOIN completed ON started.paid_source = completed.paid_source ORDER BY signup_cvr_percent DESC

panels.title: Onboarding completion by source
panels.hogql: WITH viewed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_viewed FROM events WHERE event IN ('onboarding_viewed','onboarding_step_viewed') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source), completed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_completed FROM events WHERE event IN ('onboarding_assessment_complete','onboarding_completed') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source) SELECT coalesce(viewed.paid_source, completed.paid_source) AS paid_source, coalesce(viewed.users_viewed, 0) AS users_viewed, coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) AS users_completed, if(coalesce(viewed.users_viewed, 0) = 0, 0, round(100.0 * coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) / viewed.users_viewed, 2)) AS onboarding_cvr_percent FROM viewed FULL OUTER JOIN completed ON viewed.paid_source = completed.paid_source ORDER BY onboarding_cvr_percent DESC

panels.title: Step volume and dropoff by source
panels.hogql: SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, coalesce(properties['step_name'], properties['step'], properties['funnel_step'], 'n/a') AS funnel_step, count() AS events, uniq(distinct_id) AS users FROM events WHERE event IN ('onboarding_step_viewed','onboarding_step_completed','onboarding_assessment_funnel_step') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source, funnel_step ORDER BY paid_source ASC, users DESC

panels.title: Assessment complete to dashboard welcome rate
panels.hogql: WITH completed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_completed FROM events WHERE event IN ('onboarding_assessment_complete','onboarding_completed') AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source), welcomed AS (SELECT coalesce(properties['paid_source'], lower(properties['utm_source']), 'unknown') AS paid_source, uniq(distinct_id) AS users_welcomed FROM events WHERE event = 'dashboard_welcome_viewed' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY paid_source) SELECT coalesce(completed.paid_source, welcomed.paid_source) AS paid_source, coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) AS users_completed, coalesce(welcomed.users_welcomed, 0) AS users_welcomed, if(coalesce(completed.users_completed, 0) = 0, 0, round(100.0 * coalesce(welcomed.users_welcomed, 0) / completed.users_completed, 2)) AS activation_percent FROM completed FULL OUTER JOIN welcomed ON completed.paid_source = welcomed.paid_source ORDER BY activation_percent DESC
